title: Paratropia obovata
taxonomy: Paratropia obovata is a species of spider, classified within the family Paratropididae. It belongs to the infraorder Mygalomorphae, which comprises the tarantulas and their relatives. This spider is also categorized within the order Araneomorphae, which includes most modern spiders. The family Paratropididae is a group of neotropical spiders commonly known as 'bald-legged tarantulas'. These spiders are known for their unique appearance and are often found in tropical regions.
